ownership:
I've owned two copies of this book over the years.
The first was a VF copy that came as part of the 2000 collection, for which I paid around $3.50 and that sold for $28 in May, 2023, netting me over $24.
The other one is a VG/FN copy that I got as part of a box of Sub-Mariner comics in an auction and that is still for sale on ebay.
